critique_summary: Decision policy: ACCEPT if visual_relevance >= 7, prompt_faithfulness >= 7, transformation_quality >= 7, and automatic signal >= threshold; otherwise REVISE. The generated image has pixel similarity 0.97, color similarity 0.07, brightness shift 0.02, and change level 0.03 for enhancement mode. Automatic signal (heuristic_proxy) is 0.638. CLIP was unavailable or disabled, so this score is a labeled color/brightness heuristic proxy rather than true CLIP similarity.

human_evaluation_template.human_notes: Manual review: the landscape structure and moon are preserved while the enhancement improves visibility; the golden-hour effect could be richer.
